name: Waffles
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons Salad Oil or Melted Crisco
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg yolks.
3. Gradually add milk to the egg yolks, stirring constantly.
4. Combine the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients, mixing until smooth.
5. Add the salad oil or melted Crisco.
6. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
